concept: upper half-plane geodesics and parallel axiom failure
inspection_target: vertical lines and boundary-orthogonal semicircles through one point that miss a fixed geodesic
validation: geodesic endpoints lie on the real boundary and plotted semicircles contain the marked point

concept: upper half-plane, Poincare disk, and Klein disk models
inspection_target: Poincare geodesics remain boundary-orthogonal circles while Klein geodesics become chords
validation: Cayley distance agreement and Klein collinearity residual

concept: real Mobius transformations of the half-plane
inspection_target: grid angles are locally preserved while geodesics move to geodesics
representation: conformal grid plus Plotly generator lab
validation: finite-difference angle check and imaginary-part formula

concept: reflections, products of reflections, and three-reflection theorem scaffold
inspection_target: anti-Mobius reflections fix a geodesic; two such reflections yield familiar Mobius maps
representation: reflection diagram plus NetworkX proof graph
validation: reflection involution and matrix factorization checks

inspection_target: distance to the boundary grows without bound and equal ratios on the y-axis give equal steps
representation: Matplotlib heatmaps plus Plotly hover lab
validation: axis log-distance, additivity, symmetry, and Mobius invariance checks
